# SYNAPSE — When AI Disagrees, Humanity Decides
> Real-time AI Agent Swarm Control Center. Monitor autonomous agents, detect conflicts, simulate risk, and authorize human-layer interventions across the Stellar Federation.

## Key Pages
- /: Main control center dashboard
- /#overview: System-wide metrics and mission parameters
- /#agents: Live AI agent roster and status
- /#conflicts: Active resource conflict detector
- /#simulation: Predictive risk simulation
- /#analytics: City agent map and system health
